headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump goes from opening the Strait of Hormuz to blockading it
summary: The failed peace talks left investors on edge with little visibility on how the blockade will be implemented, and how long and deep an oil shock needs to be priced in.

headline: A Look At CF Industries (CF) Valuation After Sector Pullback On Weaker Nitrogen Prices And Geopolitical Easing
summary: CF Industries Holdings (CF) has come under pressure after a sector wide pullback in fertilizer stocks, as weaker nitrogen spot prices and a cautious tone on agricultural commodities fed into broader risk sentiment. See our latest analysis for CF Industries Holdings. Even with the latest pullback, CF Industries Holdings’ share price at US$121.32 sits on a strong run, with a 90 day share price return of 50.17% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 72.42%. This points to momentum that has...
